CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2019 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-08-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-20-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-08-2019 Off Calendar

MOTION - Notice Of Motion And Motion To Bifurcate The Litigation; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Vanessa Pouladian
Off Calendar May-01-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Pete Clancey, Esq., Clancey & Diaz, Telephone 925-835-7500, appearing for Plaintiff;
Vanessa Pouladian, Esq, CP Law Group, Telephone 818-853-5142,appearing for Defendant(s) Case De Vida Associates, LP et al; (CourtCall)

RULING - A R G U E D. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CASA DE VIDA ASSOCIATES, LP, BARCELON ASSOCIATES MANAGEMENT CORPORATION's Motion To Bifurcate The Litigation.

Defendants Barcelon Associates Management Corporation and Casa De Vida Associations, LP's motion to bifurcate the litigation is denied without prejudice to Defendants seeking the same relief from the assigned trial judge.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
